channel.title: Compute Controls Watch
channel.description: Export-control changes, machine-detected and human-reviewed. Not legal advice.

item.title: OFAC SDN list: 27 additions (Iran, Cuba, Cyber) + 1,730 internal-ID modifications
item.description: Twenty-seven entities and individuals were added to the Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) list across three sanctions programmes [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:snap-7e70fdca5d98945e]. Additions under IRAN-EO13902 include LAVASANI, Ahmad Navai [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57949], CDM TRADING LIMITED [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57934], ABADI, Shokufeh Rostam [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57945], MOHSEN KHANDAN AND PARTNERS GENERAL PARTNERSHIP COMPANY [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57933], KHANDAN, Mohsen [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57942], KHANDAN, Ali Asghar [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57943], DARBANI, Mohammad [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57947], LAVASANI AND PARTNERS GENERAL PARTNERSHIP COMPANY [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57948], LAVASANI, Amir Navai [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57950], SARSHARI, Zahra [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57946], and MOHAMMAD DARBANI AND PARTNERS EXCHANGE GENERAL PARTNERSHIP COMPANY [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57944]. One individual, ANSARI, Ali, was added under programmes IRAN-EO13876, SDGT, IFSR, and IRGC [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57957]. SMART GLOBAL LIMITED was added under IRAN-EO13876 and SDGT [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57960]. Additions under CUBA-EO14404 include GRUPO EMPRESARIAL DEL COMERCIO EXTERIOR [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:58051], CORPORACION ANTILLANA EXPORTADORA SA [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:58056], COREYDAN S.A. [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:58057], GRUPO EMPRESARIAL DE TRANSPORTE MARITIMO PORTUARIO [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:58054], ENETEC S.A. [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:58052], ORGANIZACION SUPERIOR DE DIRECCION EMPRESARIAL CAUDAL S.A. [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:58053], ASSOCIATION OF COMBATANTS OF THE CUBAN REVOLUTION [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:58046], MINISTRY OF TOURISM OF CUBA [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:58059], RAPID RESPONSE BRIGADES [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:58058], and MILICIAS DE TROPAS TERRITORIALES [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:58055]. Two additions under CYBER4 are FIRST VPN SERVICE [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57975] and RASHEVSKYI, Dmytro [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:57978]. Two further added entries are present in the full event record but were truncated from this digest [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:snap-7e70fdca5d98945e]. A total of 1,730 existing SDN entries were modified; the sole field changed in all modified records is 'ids', indicating internal identifier updates with no change to designated names, programmes, or other substantive fields [CSL:Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) - Treasury Department:snap-7e70fdca5d98945e].

item.title: Corrigendum deletes the sub-193 nm light-source criterion from Annex I entry 3B501.f.1.a
item.description: The corrigendum of 9 February 2026 to Delegated Regulation (EU) 2025/2003 replaces the text of entry 3B501.f.1.a, 'A light source wavelength shorter than 193 nm; or', with 'Not used;' [OJ L 2026/90092, entry 3B501.f.1.a]. 'Not used' is the Annex I placeholder for a deleted provision: the sub-193 nm light-source criterion no longer exists as a route into entry 3B501.f.1, whose remaining sub-points are unchanged [OJ L 2026/90092, entry 3B501.f.1.a].
